mapper.insert: insert into tb_user(userId, userPw, userName, userNick, userGender, userRegion, userWeight, userHeight) values(#{userId},#{userPw},#{userName},#{userNick},#{userGender},#{userRegion},#{userWeight},#{userHeight})
INSERT INTO tb_like(likeIdx, postIdx, userNick, likeCheck) VALUES ((SELECT NVL(MAX(likeIdx), 0) + 1 as likeIdx FROM tb_like), #{postIdx}, #{userNick}, 0)
insert into tb_like(postIdx, userNick, likeCheck) values (#{postIdx}, #{userNick}, #{likeCheck})
